---
title: "NA"
slug: "template_works"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


(Text kindly supplied by Amy de Gruchy)

#### Publication

#### Contents

#### Further Reading

L. Madden,*J.B. Shorthouse and C.M. Yonge*, unpublished thesis, University of London Diploma in Librarianship, 1964

Ethel Romanes,*Charlotte Mary Yonge. An Appreciation*. A.R. Mowbray & Co., London 1908  
Georgina Battiscombe,*Charlotte Mary Yonge*. Constable, London 1943  
Alice Fairfax Lucy, 'The other Miss Yonge', in*A Chaplet for Charlotte Yonge*. Edited for The Charlotte Yonge Society by Georgina Battiscombe and Marghanita Laski. The Cresset Press, London 1965
